ham.subject: Your Pro Plan Subscription Is Expiring Soon – Renew Now to Avoid Service Disruption
ham.body:
Dear John Doe,

Thank you for choosing SaaSify Pro. Your subscription is set to expire on June 30, 2024. As a valued customer, we would like to offer you an exclusive 10% discount if you renew within the next 3 days. Please review your upcoming invoice and renew your plan by visiting: <URL>

If you have any questions or need assistance, our support team is available 24/7. Use the following link to open your account dashboard: <URL>.

We appreciate your continued partnership and look forward to serving you.

Best regards,
SaaSify Customer Success Team

spam.subject: Urgent: Claim Your $10,000 Scholarship Offer – Deadline Approaching!
